import React, { useState } from 'react'; import resume from "../../data/resume"; import './Contact.css'; export default function Contact() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }); const [sent, setSent] = useState(false); const handle = (e) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [e.target.name]: e.target.value })); const submit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setSent(true); }; const contactItems = [ { icon: '✉', label: 'Email', val: data.email, href: `mailto:${data.email}` }, { icon: '📱', label: 'Phone', val: data.phone, href: `tel:${data.phone}` }, { icon: '📍', label: 'Location', val: data.location, href: null }, { icon: '⌨', label: 'GitHub', val: '@Rohit551800', href: data.github }, ]; return (
GET IN TOUCH

Let's Connect

{/* Left info */}

I'm currently open to internship opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.

{contactItems.map(ci => (
{ci.icon}

{ci.label}

{ci.href ? {ci.val} :

{ci.val}

}
))}
GitHub ↗ LinkedIn ↗ ShopZone ↗
{/* Right form */}
{sent ? (
✓

Message Sent!

Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.

) : (
